# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Write secure code.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-provider.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-provider.com
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.payment-provider.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.payment-provider.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure,refused-stream
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.payment-provider.com
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external-db.com
  addresses:
  - 10.20.30.40/32
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.20.30.40
    ports:
      tcp-postgres: 5432
  exportTo:
  - "production"
  - "staging"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external-db.com
  exportTo:
  - "production"
  - "staging"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: postgres.external-db.com
        port:
          number: 5432
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mongodb.external-db.com
  ports:
  - number: 27017
    name: tcp-mongo
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mongodb.external-db.com
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 27017
    route:
    - destination:
        host: mongodb.external-db.com
        port:
          number: 27017
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-auth-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - auth.external-provider.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-auth-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - auth.external-provider.com
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 80
    redirect:
      uri: /
      authority: auth.external-provider.com
      port: 443
      redirectCode: 301
  - match:
    - port: 443
    timeout: 20s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 7s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    route:
    - destination:
        host: auth.external-provider.com
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
      - s3.amazonaws.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: s3.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.external-cache.com
  addresses:
  - 10.30.40.50/32
  ports:
  - number: 6379
    name: tcp-redis
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.30.40.50
    ports:
      tcp-redis: 6379
  exportTo:
  - "production"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.external-cache.com
  exportTo:
  - "production"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 6379
    route:
    - destination:
        host: redis.external-cache.com
        port:
          number: 6379
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - elasticsearch.external-logging.com
  ports:
  - number: 9200
    name: https-es
    protocol: HTTPS
  - number: 9300
    name: tcp-es
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - elasticsearch.external-logging.com
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 9200
    timeout: 60s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 30s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset
    route:
    - destination:
        host: elasticsearch.external-logging.com
        port:
          number: 9200
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 9300
    route:
    - destination:
        host: elasticsearch.external-logging.com
        port:
          number: 9300
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-smtp-server
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - smtp.email-provider.com
  ports:
  - number: 587
    name: tcp-smtp
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 465
    name: tcp-smtps
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "production"
  - "staging"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-smtp-server
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - smtp.email-provider.com
  exportTo:
  - "production"
  - "staging"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 587
    route:
    - destination:
        host: smtp.email-provider.com
        port:
          number: 587
  - match:
    - port: 465
    route:
    - destination:
        host: smtp.email-provider.com
        port:
          number: 465
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - analytics.third-party.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - analytics.third-party.com
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    timeout: 15s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 5s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    headers:
      request:
        add:
          X-Mesh-Source: "istio-egress"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: analytics.third-party.com
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-kafka-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - kafka-broker-1.external-kafka.com
  - kafka-broker-2.external-kafka.com
  - kafka-broker-3.external-kafka.com
  ports:
  - number: 9092
    name: tcp-kafka
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 9093
    name: tcp-kafka-ssl
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "production"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-kafka-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - kafka-broker-1.external-kafka.com
  - kafka-broker-2.external-kafka.com
  - kafka-broker-3.external-kafka.com
  exportTo:
  - "production"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 9092
    route:
    - destination:
        host: kafka-broker-1.external-kafka.com
        port:
          number: 9092
      weight: 33
    - destination:
        host: kafka-broker-2.external-kafka.com
        port:
          number: 9092
      weight: 33
    - destination:
        host: kafka-broker-3.external-kafka.com
        port:
          number: 9092
      weight: 34
  - match:
    - port: 9093
    route:
    - destination:
        host: kafka-broker-1.external-kafka.com
        port:
          number: 9093
      weight: 33
    - destination:
        host: kafka-broker-2.external-kafka.com
        port:
          number: 9093
      weight: 33
    - destination:
        host: kafka-broker-3.external-kafka.com
        port:
          number: 9093
      weight: 34
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-cdn
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - cdn.content-delivery.com
  - "*.cdn.content-delivery.com"
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-cdn
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - cdn.content-delivery.com
  - "*.cdn.content-delivery.com"
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - cdn.content-delivery.com
      - "*.cdn.content-delivery.com"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: cdn.content-delivery.com
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-webhook-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - webhooks.external-service.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-webhook-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - webhooks.external-service.com
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    timeout: 45s
    retries:
      attempts: 1
      perTryTimeout: 45s
      retryOn: 5xx
    route:
    - destination:
        host: webhooks.external-service.com
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mysql-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mysql.external-db.com
  addresses:
  - 10.40.50.60/32
  ports:
  - number: 3306
    name: tcp-mysql
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.40.50.60
    ports:
      tcp-mysql: 3306
  exportTo:
  - "production"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-mysql-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mysql.external-db.com
  exportTo:
  - "production"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 3306
    route:
    - destination:
        host: mysql.external-db.com
        port:
          number: 3306
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-monitoring-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - monitoring.external-service.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-monitoring-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - monitoring.external-service.com
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    timeout: 10s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 3s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    route:
    - destination:
        host: monitoring.external-service.com
        port:
          number: 443
